name: Harsh Raj
headline: Computer Science & Engineering Student | Junior Software Developer @ Vulcan Learning Collective | AI & Data Analytics Enthusiast | Python & SQL Developer | Campus Mantri @ GeeksforGeeks
summary: Second-year CS student (CGPA 8.95) with backend and full-stack experience across React, Next.js, Node.js, FastAPI, and MongoDB. Built projects with real LLM integrations, RBAC, and real-time WebSocket dashboards. Hackathon finalist (4th of 150 nationally) and FOSS hackathon winner. Looking for SWE internships.
bio: Computer Science Engineering student at PES Institute of Technology & Management (VTU) interested in software engineering, data analytics, and AI-powered applications. Skilled in Python, SQL, Java, React, FastAPI, and MongoDB, with hands-on experience building full-stack projects, REST APIs, real-time dashboards, and LLM-based applications. Active in technical communities through GeeksforGeeks and campus initiatives, and regularly participates in hackathons and skill-building programs.
college: PES Institute of Technology and Management
mission: To build intelligent, scalable software solutions that solve real-world problems, contribute to open-source communities, and grow as a backend and AI engineer through hands-on projects and collaborative environments.
